hero.subtitle: AI-powered emotional support, craving management, sleep tracking, and nutrition guidance — all in one secure platform designed for your recovery journey.

features.heading: Everything You Need for Recovery
features.subheading: Comprehensive tools designed with research-backed approaches to support every aspect of your recovery journey.
features.aiSupportDesc: Emotion-aware chatbot that understands and responds to your feelings with personalized guidance.
features.sleepAnalysisDesc: Track sleep patterns and receive insights to improve rest during recovery.
features.cravingManagementDesc: Predict and manage cravings with data-driven forecasting and coping strategies.
features.nutritionGuidanceDesc: Research-backed meal plans tailored to support recovery and gut health.
features.progressTrackingDesc: Visualize your recovery journey with detailed analytics and milestones.
features.riskAssessmentDesc: Real-time relapse risk scoring to help you stay ahead of challenges.

howItWorks.heading: Simple Steps to Start
howItWorks.subheading: Get started in minutes with our straightforward onboarding process.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up securely with Google or your phone number
howItWorks.step2Desc: Share your recovery goals and preferences
howItWorks.step3Desc: Log cravings, sleep, and emotions regularly
howItWorks.step4Desc: Receive personalized insights and AI guidance

testimonials.heading: Stories of Recovery
testimonials.subheading: Real experiences from people on their recovery journey.
testimonials.alex: The AI chatbot has been incredible. It's like having a supportive friend who truly understands what I'm going through.
testimonials.maria: The craving forecaster helped me prepare for difficult moments. I finally feel in control of my recovery.
testimonials.james: I recommend this to all my clients. The nutrition guidance and progress tracking are game-changers.

cta.subtitleSignedIn: Track your progress, get personalized support, and stay motivated on your path to recovery.
cta.subtitleSignedOut: Join thousands who have found support and tools for recovery. Start your journey today — it's free.

settings.heading: Guardian Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage patient information and your contact details
settings.treatingDoctorDesc: Add your doctor's details so they can monitor the patient's progress, receive alerts, and schedule meetings.
settings.doctorInviteNote: Doctor will receive an invitation to access the clinical dashboard
settings.patientInfoDesc: Information about the patient you are monitoring and caring for.
settings.daysInRecoveryNote: Number of days since patient started recovery
settings.darkModeDesc: Toggle between light and dark theme
settings.doctorInviteFailed: Failed to send doctor invitation. Please try again.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Let's set up your safety network before you start.
onboarding.highRiskAlertsDesc: Your guardian will be notified when your risk score is elevated, so they can reach out and support you.
onboarding.sosButtonDesc: A quick way to alert your guardian when you need immediate help - they'll receive an urgent notification.
onboarding.weeklyReportsDesc: Your guardian receives a summary of your weekly progress, keeping them informed and engaged in your recovery.
onboarding.privacyNotice: Your privacy matters: Only summary information is shared. Your conversations with the AI chatbot and personal notes remain private.
onboarding.guardianInfoSubtitle: Enter the details of someone you trust to support your recovery.
onboarding.guardianEmailNote: Alerts and reports will be sent to this email address
onboarding.treatingDoctorNote: Add your doctor's details to enable clinical monitoring (optional)
onboarding.doctorEmailNote: Your doctor will receive an invitation to access patient reports
onboarding.recoveryProfileSubtitle: Help us personalize your dashboard. This gives you a better starting point.
onboarding.daysInRecoveryNote: How many days since you started your recovery journey
onboarding.sleepOptimalNote: Based on your bed time and wake time. Optimal sleep is 7-9 hours.
onboarding.chatbotStyleNote: How the AI chatbot should respond to you
onboarding.confirmSubtitle: Review your guardian information and notification preferences.
onboarding.highRiskAlertsPrefDesc: Alert when risk score is elevated
onboarding.sosAlertsPrefDesc: Alert when you press the SOS button
onboarding.doctorInviteNote: An invitation will be sent to your doctor to access the clinical dashboard.
onboarding.validEmail: Please enter a valid email address
onboarding.validDoctorEmail: Please enter a valid doctor email address
onboarding.negativeDays: Days in recovery cannot be negative

chat.selectUser: Select a user to start chatting...

dash.startTracking: Start tracking your patient's recovery by logging their craving levels or sleep patterns.
dash.highRiskDesc: Patient's stress and cravings are elevated. Consider reaching out to provide support.
dash.moderateRiskDesc: Some risk factors are elevated. Monitor closely and encourage preventive strategies.
dash.lowRiskDesc: Patient is doing well. Continue monitoring and encouraging healthy habits.
dash.dailyQuoteText: Recovery is not a race. You don't have to feel guilty if it takes longer than you thought.

aiChat.heading: AI Recovery Assistant
aiChat.subtitle: Get guidance on supporting your patient's recovery
aiChat.useQuickActions: Use quick actions above or type below

sleep.heading: Patient's Sleep Tracker
sleep.subtitle: Monitor and log your patient's sleep patterns
sleep.logSleepDesc: Enter your patient's sleep information based on your observations or their report.

cravings.heading: Patient's Craving Tracker
cravings.subtitle: Log and monitor your patient's cravings and triggers
cravings.cravingIntensityNote: How intense are the patient's cravings right now?
cravings.stressLevelNote: How stressed does the patient appear?
cravings.moodNote: Rate the patient's overall mood (10 = very positive)
cravings.alertNote: High intensity (≥8) + High stress (≥8) will trigger an alert

hospitals.heading: Hospitals & Emergency
hospitals.subtitle: Find nearby hospitals and rehab centers. Tap any hospital to open in Google Maps.
hospitals.emergencyNumbersDesc: In case of emergency, call immediately
hospitals.tip1: Keep emergency numbers saved on your phone
hospitals.tip2: Know the location of your nearest hospital
hospitals.tip3: Inform your guardian about your condition
hospitals.tip4: Use the SOS button in this app for immediate help

meds.heading: Patient's Medication Management
meds.subtitle: Manage your patient's medications and set up reminders
meds.setupRemindersDesc: Set up SMS and email reminders for your patient's medications. You will receive notifications at scheduled times.
meds.consultProvider: These medications are commonly prescribed by doctors for your type of recovery. Consult your healthcare provider before starting any medication.
meds.noMedsYet: No medications added for patient yet
meds.addFromRecommendations: Add doctor-prescribed medications or select from recommendations
meds.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields

nutrition.heading: Nutrition for Recovery
nutrition.subtitle: Research-backed nutrition to support your healing journey
nutrition.personalizedRecs: Personalized nutrition recommendations based on your recovery from {{type}}.
nutrition.setAddictionType: Set your addiction type in Profile for personalized recommendations.
nutrition.gutBrainDesc: Research shows gut health directly impacts mood, cravings, and recovery. Focus on:
nutrition.generateMealPlanDesc: Generate a personalized weekly meal plan based on your recovery needs.
nutrition.noMealPlanDesc: Generate a personalized meal plan based on your recovery needs.
nutrition.noGroceryDesc: Generate a meal plan to auto-populate your grocery list.

sos.sosDesc: This will immediately alert your guardian that you need help. They will receive an urgent email and SMS with your current status.
sos.messagePlaceholder: Let your guardian know what's happening...
sos.metricsShared: Current metrics that will be shared:
sos.emergencyNotice: If you're in immediate danger, call 911 (US) or your local emergency number.
